\x1b[5;1H\x1b[0mHere is the answer to your question:\x1b[K
\x1b[6;1H\x1b[K
\x1b[7;1H\x1b[0m  \x1b[33m1.\x1b[0m The Go programming language uses static typing.\x1b[K
\x1b[8;1H\x1b[0m  \x1b[33m2.\x1b[0m Concurrency is handled via goroutines and channels.\x1b[K
\x1b[9;1H\x1b[0m  \x1b[33m3.\x1b[0m Error handling is explicit, not exception-based.\x1b[K
\x1b[10;1H\x1b[K
